mnemonics.title: SVM Parameters
mnemonics.content: C - Classification strictness, γ - Gaussian Radius, ε - Epsilon tube (for regression)

mnemonics.title: Kernel Properties
mnemonics.content: KISS: Kernel must be Symmetric, Positive Semi-definite, Implicit feature Space

acronyms.usage: Algorithm for solving SVM optimization problem

visualTips.visualization: Imagine lifting data points into balloon-like higher dimension where separation becomes easy
Picture data points 'supporting' the margin like pillars holding up a roof

analogies.analogy: Like analyzing x-ray images without knowing anatomy - using patterns rather than explicit features
Building widest possible road between two cities of data points
